allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines[-30:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role',''\) typ = obj.get\('type',''\) if role == 'user': content = obj.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'USER: {c[\\"text\\"][:500]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'USER: {content[:500]}'\) elif role == 'assistant': content = obj.get\('content',''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'ASSISTANT: {c[\\"text\\"][:500]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'ASSISTANT: {content[:500]}'\) except: pass ")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const data=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/santy/.claude/projects/C--Users-santy-Desktop-trabajo-negocio/2627d5aa-c914-4f9b-9a38-48a73e95d0da.jsonl','utf8'\);const lines=data.trim\(\).split\('\\n'\);console.log\('Total lines:',lines.length\);for\(const line of lines.slice\(-20\)\){try{const obj=JSON.parse\(line\);if\(obj.role==='user'\){console.log\('USER:',String\(obj.content\).slice\(0,300\)\)}else if\(obj.role==='assistant'\){const c=obj.content;if\(Array.isArray\(c\)\){c.forEach\(x=>{if\(x.type==='text'\)console.log\('ASST:',x.text.slice\(0,300\)\);if\(x.type==='tool_use'\)console.log\('TOOL_USE:',x.name\)}\)}}}catch\(e\){console.log\('parse err'\)}}")

Bash(node -e "const fs=require\('fs'\);const data=fs.readFileSync\('C:/Users/santy/.claude/projects/C--Users-santy-Desktop-trabajo-negocio/2627d5aa-c914-4f9b-9a38-48a73e95d0da.jsonl','utf8'\);const lines=data.split\(/\\r?\\n/\).filter\(Boolean\);for\(let i=165;i<175;i++\){try{const o=JSON.parse\(lines[i]\);const msg=o.message||o;const c=msg.content;if\(Array.isArray\(c\)\){c.forEach\(x=>{if\(x.type==='text'&&x.text.length>50\)console.log\('LINE',i,msg.role,x.text.slice\(0,2000\)\);if\(x.type==='tool_use'\)console.log\('LINE',i,'TOOL:',x.name,JSON.stringify\(x.input\).slice\(0,300\)\)}\)}else if\(typeof c==='string'&&c.length>10\){console.log\('LINE',i,msg.role||o.type,c.slice\(0,2000\)\)}}catch\(e\){}}")
